ddls:
CREATE TABLE "league" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Full name of the league */,
  "league_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conference" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the league table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "division" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the conference table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the division table */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "team_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the season table */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the team table (home team) */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the team table (away team) */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the team performance */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the season table */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the team table */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team based on overall performance */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage of the team (1 for 100%, 0.5 for 50%, etc.) */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the team based on performance metrics */,
  "average_MOV" REAL /* Average margin of victory (MOV) for the team */,
  "average_MOL" REAL /* Average margin of loss (MOL) for the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference to which the team belongs (e.g., NFC West, AFC North) */,
  "raw_rank" REAL /* Raw rank of the team based on raw performance metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)
column_names: Foreign key referencing the league table
Foreign key referencing the conference table
Foreign key referencing the division table
Foreign key referencing the season table
Foreign key referencing the team table (home team)
Foreign key referencing the team table (away team)
